title: Phenylamine and azo compounds
summary: 9701 A Level phenylamine — preparation, diazonium chemistry, and azo dyes.
learningObjectives: Explain reduced basicity of aryl amines.
Describe azo coupling to make dyes.

simpleExplanation.title: From nitrobenzene to coloured dyes
simpleExplanation.summary: Phenylamine is made by reduction. Diazonium salts formed at low temperature couple with phenols to give vivid azo compounds.
steps: Couple with phenol → orange azo dye.

sections.content: **Phenylamine and azo compounds** (34.2) combine **aromatic chemistry** with **kinetic control** of diazonium stability.
